name: Inventory BYOV Equipment Assessment
description: Inventory assessment for BYOV program to determine equipment needs

steps.title: Assess Vehicle Storage Capacity
steps.description: Evaluate vehicle's ability to store required equipment

substeps.title: Measure available cargo space
substeps.description: Assess dimensions and capacity of vehicle storage areas

substeps.title: Evaluate storage security
substeps.description: Check security features for equipment protection

substeps.title: Check equipment compatibility
substeps.description: Verify vehicle can accommodate standard equipment

steps.title: Determine Inventory Allocation
steps.description: Decide what inventory items to allocate for BYOV setup

substeps.title: Create required equipment list
substeps.description: Generate list of equipment needed for technician role

substeps.title: Check inventory availability
substeps.description: Verify equipment is available for allocation

steps.title: Document Inventory Allocation
steps.description: Create documentation for BYOV inventory allocation

substeps.title: Generate allocation record
substeps.description: Create formal record of equipment allocation for BYOV
